caption: A screen recording captures a video call and a digital workspace. The primary focus is a dark-themed mind map featuring various circular icons connected by lines, with labels such as "Insights," "Interconnectedness," and "Holistic Flow." A small video feed in the top right corner shows a man wearing a dark baseball cap. At the top of the browser, several tabs are visible, including "Trust & Learning by Systemic," "Moments by Systemic," and "Future of Society by Systemic." As the sequence progresses, a second video feed appears in the bottom right, showing a man with glasses. In the final stage, the central mind map becomes dimmed and partially obscured by a dark overlay, while the two video feeds of the men remain clearly visible. The interface also displays a "Guest" label and a menu with options like "Edit" and "Talk."
